name: Nesselrode Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Warm the eggs in a double boiler.
2. Whip them with an electric mixer until they form soft peaks.
3. Gradually beat in the sugar, continuing to whip until thickened.
4. Soften the gelatin in cold water and dissolve it over hot water.
5. Whip the cream until it forms soft peaks.
6. Gently fold the beaten gelatin and vanilla into the egg mixture.
7. Fold in the whipped cream.
8. Carefully incorporate the chestnut puree and chopped candied chestnuts.
9. Spoon the mixture into the pie shell and refrigerate until set.
10. Top with sweetened whipped cream before serving.
